# dnd-cards — Documentation Index

**Generated:** 2026-04-12 | **Scan:** Deep | **Type:** CLI (Python monolith)

---

## Quick Reference

| | |
|---|---|
| **Language** | Python 3.11+ |
| **Architecture** | Pipeline CLI — discover → load → render → compose → PDF |
| **Entry point** | `dnd_cards.cli:app` (registered as `dnd-cards`) |
| **Deployment** | `uv tool install .` |
| **Data** | 511 YAML card files (339 spells · 17 talents · 155 rules, de/SRD 5.2) |
| **Tests** | pytest · mypy --strict · ruff TID252 |

---

---

## Getting Started

```bash
# Install
uv tool install .

# List available cards
dnd-cards list

# Generate a PDF
dnd-cards generate --deck decks/example.yaml

# Interactive deck builder
dnd-cards tui
```

---

## Sprint Status Summary (2026-04-12)

| Epic | Status | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Epic 1 — Foundation & Card Data | in-progress | Stories 1-1 through 1-5 done |
| Epic 2 — Core PDF Generation | in-progress | Stories 2-1 through 2-4 in review |
| Epic 3 — Deck Profiles & Validation | backlog | Not started |
| Epic 4 — Seed Data & Polish | in-progress | Story 4-3 (talent/rule) in review |
| Epic 5 — TUI Deck Builder | in-progress | Story 5-1 (TUI) in review |

---

## Module Map

| Module | File | Key exports |
|---|---|---|
| CLI | `src/dnd_cards/cli.py` | `app` (Typer) |
| Config | `src/dnd_cards/config.py` | PDF constants, `DEFAULT_DATA_DIR` |
| Errors | `src/dnd_cards/errors.py` | `DndCardsError` + 4 subclasses |
| Models | `src/dnd_cards/models.py` | `CardData`, `DeckProfile`, `DeckEntry`, `Language` |
| Loader | `src/dnd_cards/loader.py` | `load_card()`, `load_deck()` |
| Scanner | `src/dnd_cards/scanner.py` | `scan_cards()`, `CardRef` |
| Renderer | `src/dnd_cards/renderer.py` | `render_card()` |
| Composer | `src/dnd_cards/composer.py` | `compose_pdf()`, `register_fonts()` |
| TUI | `src/dnd_cards/tui.py` | `DeckBuilderApp`, `run_tui()`, `slugify()` |
